name: ai-project-studio
description: Guide durable game and web projects through discovery, recoverable context, deliverable contracts, user approvals, implementation, and verification.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and advance game and web projects safely.
interface.longDescription: A producer-led workflow that keeps project state in the repository, exposes current-stage blind spots, declares deliverable fidelity, and protects important decisions with approval and evidence gates.
defaultPrompt: 使用 $manage-project-studio 启动当前项目。先只进入 Discovery，不实现、不委派；区分事实、假设和未知，指出最大风险，只问一个关键问题。
使用 $manage-project-studio 恢复当前项目上下文，并告诉我唯一推荐的下一步。
使用 $manage-project-studio 根据交付物契约和证据验收当前工作项。
